# Curriculum Design: Progressive Exploration v37

### Stage 5: Archives

### Stage 6: Harbor

### Stage 7: Harbor

### Stage 8: Harbor

## Advancement Rule
Progress when success rate > threshold for 3 consecutive episodes.
